findings.summary: Historical final-review evidence still contains the prior BLOCKED verdict, but current gate evidence supersedes it and records the full composed local-harness run with exit 0.

checks_reviewed.evidence: Branch feat/reviewer-bridge-agent at 31633b8e99fe6da5f44f2d444de8d0e87b75e46b with scoped docs, bridge, and evidence changes.

.claude/agents/reviewer.md:3-12 lists all five verdict reviewers plus po-docs-researcher and tools Bash, Read, Grep; .claude/agents/reviewer.md:103-107 prohibits edits, mutating commands, failed-gate approval, recursive delegation, and json-envelope use with po-docs-researcher.

scripts/codex-headless-review.mjs:7-24 allows the wm/po/design agents and defines exactly five verdict-producing reviewers; scripts/codex-headless-review.mjs:222-224 rejects --json-envelope for non-verdict agents.

CLAUDE.md:47-64, REPO_OPERATIONS.md:162-168, and PROJECT_ENVIRONMENT.md:270-275 agree the file is a read-only bridge, not a reviewer-logic port; AGENTS.md:24-31 and REPO_OPERATIONS.md:100-101 preserve Codex runtime path ownership.
.evidence/reviews/20260614-reviewer-bridge-gates.md:30-33 records node scripts/validate-repo-operations.mjs and 'Validated repo operations policy ownership.'

.evidence/reviews/20260614-reviewer-bridge-gates.md:6-10 records the full composed command; lines 20-71 record test:runtime; lines 72-150 record pnpm turbo run lint test; lines 152-156 record harness pass and exit status 0.
No mobile UI, NativeWind styling, selectors, Expo Router screens, or native runtime paths changed; affected paths are bridge/docs/evidence only.
No apps/api or packages/contracts files changed; bridge routes API contract review to wm-contract-reviewer per .claude/agents/reviewer.md:35-36.

residual_risks: Live Claude Code custom-agent dispatch behavior is not proven by local source inspection or Codex gate evidence.

The bridge intentionally writes prompt and wrapper evidence under .evidence/reviews via Bash/script execution, so read-only means no repo source edits and no gate approval, not zero filesystem writes.
Historical reviewer artifacts may remain in evidence history; consumers should treat the current gate file and current final review as authoritative.
